name: kaanha-3d-web
description: Premium 3D web experiences, end to end: experience direction (narrative-first briefs), scene building (raymarched SDF or Three.js/Threlte/R3F with hard performance floors), motion direction (GSAP/Lenis scroll choreography with reduced-motion fallbacks), a GLSL pattern library with GPU cost notes, and an award-grade ship review that only accepts measured numbers. Seeded from the kaanha.tech odyssey hero that shipped to production.
